tossups.question: An artist with this surname was fond of depicting an old hurdy-gurdy player in many paintings, including one where he is fighting in The Musicians’ Brawl. An artist with this surname made many joyful self portraits such as Self-Portrait with Index Finger, and may have influenced Joseph Ducreux, who claimed to be that artist’s only student. A painting by an artist with this surname depicts a shifty woman in a feathered hat across from a (*) card sharp retrieving a card from his belt. An artist with this surname painted portraits of Rousseau and Voltaire as a leading pastel artist of the Rococo era, and is named Maurice-Quentin. The Caravaggisti influenced one artist with this surname, who created chiaroscuro-heavy interior scenes of a penitent Magdalene lit by candlelight. For 10 points, give this surname of the French Baroque artist with the first name Georges.
tossups.question_sanitized: An artist with this surname was fond of depicting an old hurdy-gurdy player in many paintings, including one where he is fighting in The Musicians' Brawl. An artist with this surname made many joyful self portraits such as Self-Portrait with Index Finger, and may have influenced Joseph Ducreux, who claimed to be that artist's only student. A painting by an artist with this surname depicts a shifty woman in a feathered hat across from a (*) card sharp retrieving a card from his belt. An artist with this surname painted portraits of Rousseau and Voltaire as a leading pastel artist of the Rococo era, and is named Maurice-Quentin. The Caravaggisti influenced one artist with this surname, who created chiaroscuro-heavy interior scenes of a penitent Magdalene lit by candlelight. For 10 points, give this surname of the French Baroque artist with the first name Georges.
tossups.answer: de La Tour [accept Georges de La Tour or Maurice-Quentin de La Tour]
tossups.answer_sanitized: de La Tour [accept Georges de La Tour or Maurice-Quentin de La Tour]
